claimText: Mauritius is the first African country to sign the International Solar Alliance's Country Partnership Framework.
evidenceExcerpt: Mauritius became the first African country to sign the ISA's Country Partnership Framework (CPF).
examUse: Statement-based question on recent international agreements and ISA developments.
distractorHooks: Naming a different African country such as South Africa or Kenya
Claiming Mauritius is the first Asian country

claimText: The SUNRISE initiative is a global effort focused on the circularity and end-of-life management of solar PV and batteries.
evidenceExcerpt: Launch of SUNRISE (Solar Upcycling Network for Recycling, Innovation & Stakeholder Engagement) - a global initiative on circularity and end-of-life (EoL) management of solar PV and batteries
examUse: Correct-pair question matching environmental initiatives to their specific objectives.
distractorHooks: Claiming SUNRISE focuses on space-based solar power
Claiming SUNRISE is a subsidy scheme for solar panel manufacturing

claimText: Following a 2020 amendment to its Framework Agreement, all United Nations member states are eligible to join the International Solar Alliance.
evidenceExcerpt: Following 2020 amendment to its Framework Agreement, all UN members are now eligible to join.
examUse: Statement-based question testing knowledge of ISA membership eligibility criteria.
distractorHooks: Claiming membership is strictly limited to countries located between the Tropics of Cancer and Capricorn
Claiming only developing nations are eligible to join

claimText: The ISA's 'Towards 1000' strategy aims to mobilize USD 1,000 billion in investments and install 1,000 GW of solar capacity by 2030.
evidenceExcerpt: ISA's 'Towards 1000' strategy aims to mobilize USD 1,000 billion in investments, deliver energy access to 1,000 million people, install 1,000 GW of solar capacity, and mitigate 1,000 million tonnes of CO2 annually by 2030.
examUse: Statement-based question on global renewable energy targets and ISA's strategic goals.
distractorHooks: Changing the target year to 2050 or 2070
Altering the target figures, such as 100 GW or USD 100 billion

claimText: The SolarX Startup Challenge, STAR-C Initiative, Global Solar Facility, and Green Hydrogen Innovation Centre are key initiatives under the International Solar Alliance.
evidenceExcerpt: Key ISA initiatives include the SolarX Startup Challenge, STAR-C Initiative, Global Solar Facility, and Green Hydrogen Innovation Centre.
examUse: Multiple-choice question identifying initiatives launched by specific international organizations.
distractorHooks: Attributing these initiatives to the International Energy Agency (IEA)
Attributing these initiatives to the UN Environment Programme (UNEP)
